action.reasoning: Observation: New best bal_acc=0.6146 from iter17 (tau~1.55, few_shot=0.446, many/medium~0.74/0.64); iter18 (s1=80ep+mixup) got 0.6132 (tau=1.45, val_tau=0.619 but test slightly lower). Stage1 val~0.53, stage2 lifts to ~0.575. Iter time ~7min, 1.83h/12 iters remain. Analysis: cRT (Focal+sqrt-s1/mixup, CE+count-s2 on head-only)+post-hoc logit adj+RandAug+pretrained RN50 is strong for CIFAR100-LT IR=100; longer s1 can yield better features without hurting convergence (prior curves stable). Current code (validate, save/load best_tau+counts, weights_only=False, seeds, metrics.jsonl) is clean and bug-free. Decision: Increment s1 to 100ep (T_max=100, AdamW lr=5e-4), keep s2=40ep+nesterov SGD0.05; rewrite full train.py with complete validate/grid-search for robustness; run then submit_eval immediately (total ~140ep OK post-baseline, targets >0.62 bal_acc).
